label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down this question about causation and intention. The scenario is a bit complex, so I need to understand the chain of events clearly. The facts: - Brown wants to kill Smith. - Smith is in another building. - There is a bomb in that building. - Brown can detonate the bomb by producing a six-dotted image on the lens of a camera focused on the top of a table in his room. - That camera is wired to the bomb. - So Brown takes a normal, fair, six-sided die and tosses it onto the table, hoping it will land six-up. - The die lands six-up, which causes the camera to capture the six dots, which triggers
